[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [44°07′N 0°32′W﻿ / ﻿44.11°N 0.54°W﻿ / 44.11; -0.54](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Canton_of_Haute_Lande_Armagnac&params=44.11_N_0.54_W_)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

The **[canton](/wiki/Cantons_of_France "Cantons of France") of Haute Lande Armagnac** is an administrative division of the [Landes](/wiki/Landes_(department) "Landes (department)") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France"), southwestern [France](/wiki/France "France"). It was created at the French canton reorganisation which came into effect in March 2015. Its seat is in [Labrit](/wiki/Labrit "Labrit").[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

It consists of the following communes:[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

1. [Argelouse](/wiki/Argelouse "Argelouse")
2. [Arue](/wiki/Arue,_Landes "Arue, Landes")
3. [Arx](/wiki/Arx,_Landes "Arx, Landes")
4. [Baudignan](/wiki/Baudignan "Baudignan")
5. [Bélis](/wiki/B%C3%A9lis "Bélis")
6. [Betbezer-d'Armagnac](/wiki/Betbezer-d%27Armagnac "Betbezer-d'Armagnac")

8. [Brocas](/wiki/Brocas "Brocas")
9. [Cachen](/wiki/Cachen "Cachen")
10. [Callen](/wiki/Callen,_Landes "Callen, Landes")
11. [Canenx-et-Réaut](/wiki/Canenx-et-R%C3%A9aut "Canenx-et-Réaut")

13. [Commensacq](/wiki/Commensacq "Commensacq")
